title: Pulau Intan Lestari Modules
summary: Workflow optimizations across modules that improved efficiency and UX for internal teams.

sections.title: Context
paragraphs: The operations team needed faster internal workflows spanning inventory, orders, and reporting.

sections.title: Responsibilities
bullets: Architected module boundaries and API contracts across services.
Led the frontend build in Next.js with SSR for key workflows.
Introduced job queues (Bull) for long‑running tasks.
